Configure Workers

Configure the behavior of this repository's automated CI activities — LabVIEW version, platforms, which activities run, and the dependencies baked into the worker image.

← Back to dashboard

1. Repository

These settings apply to the repository you came from — its current configuration is loaded automatically.

Configuring … on branch main

2. Pipeline settings

These are written to .github/labview-ci.yml.

Caps runners to the plan's concurrent-job limit.
Up to 20 concurrent jobs on the Free plan.
Activities

3. Container dependencies

VIPM packages baked into the CI worker image. Written to .github/labview/vipm/ci-tooling.packages.json; the image rebuilds when this changes.

4. Review & apply

Two apply paths. Both are reviewable before anything runs.

Option A — open a pull request (recommended)

Runs the Reconfigure workflow, which writes these settings and opens a PR. Quick toggles only (version, OS, Antidoc, runners, activities); for full dependency edits use Option B.


      


      
Option B — download & commit

      

        
        
        
      


      

        Preview generated files
        
.github/labview-ci.yml

        

        
.github/labview/vipm/ci-tooling.packages.json
